utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each is fully specified: the property includes type, location, price, size, amenities, taxes, and move-in date; financing includes method, down payment, interest rate, term, approval timeline, and documentation; legal_services includes service name, cost, included features, closing costs, title insurance, survey, and processing fees; moving_services includes service name, cost, included features, and special requirements; setup_services includes utility package type, cost, services included, and setup timeline; total_budget includes purchase price, closing costs, moving/setup, grand total, and currency. All items are detailed and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant chose a purchase property described as a '1-bedroom modern condo' in West End, Toronto, priced at CAD $465,000. This fits within Zara Patel’s purchase budget range of CAD $420K–480K. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the most comparable property by type, price, and description is 'New Build' (CAD $480K, rating 10) or possibly 'Modern Apartment' (CAD $520K, rating 9). Since the chosen property price is closer to CAD $480K and within budget, the best match is 'New Build' (rating 10). For financing, the AI used a 'mortgage' with 5% down payment and a 25-year term. Among ground-truth financing options, this corresponds most closely to 'First-Time Buyer' (rating 10), which supports a high LTV and first-time buyer benefits. For legal services, the AI picked 'Premium Legal Package', which directly matches an item in the ground-truth list with rating 8. For moving, the AI selected 'Standard Moving Package', aligning with 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). Lastly, for setup services, the AI chose a 'basic utility package' costing CAD $280; in ground truth, the closest match is 'Premium Utilities' (CAD $280, rating 9), since the price and service inclusions (gas, water, electricity, internet, smart meters) align. Therefore, the mapped ratings are 10 (property), 10 (financing), 8 (legal services), 9 (moving services), and 9 (setup services).
